channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: CCPD Virtual Appointments Notice
item.description: Due to ongoing campus construction, the Center for Career and Professional Development (CCPD) will be offering virtual appointments only at this time. If you require any special accommodations or need to meet on campus, please get in touch with us at ccpd@rpi.edu, and we will work with you to arrange an in-person option. To schedule a virtual appointment with one of our career counselors, please log in to Handshake. We appreciate your understanding and apologize for any inconvenience.
item.author: Students

item.title: 2026 Awardees of the Teaching and Learning Collaboratory Seed Projects
item.description: The Undergraduate Department and the Teaching and Learning Collaboratory are excited to announce the winners of the 2026 seed project call.
item.author: Community

item.title: Save the Date! TOPOS 2026 Music Festival | September 2-5
item.description: Date: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 12:00 AM - 1:00 AM - What does music know about us that we don’t yet know about ourselves? TOPOS returns as a space for gathering, inquiry, and discovery. Across four days of performances, live podcasts, film screenings, and conversation, the festival creates occasions for deepened listening and critical encounters: music as a means of articulating that which resists articulation. Mark your calendars now!
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Featured in Project Chapel Documentary
item.description: Now streaming on PBS, Project Chapel chronicles the installation of the world’s first IBM Quantum System One on a university campus at RPI. The documentary follows the transformation of a historic chapel into a hub for quantum innovation, exploring the people, technology, and vision behind the milestone and the potential of quantum computing to help solve some of the world’s most complex challenges. Watch now at pbs.org/show/project-chapel.
item.author: Community

item.title: Office of Strategic Alliances and Translation - Open House
item.description: The Office of Strategic Alliances and Translation invites you to in-person office hours on Thursday, June 11, 2026, 11:15 AM – 12:15 PM in room 2012 of the Troy building. Join us if you have questions about creating, licensing, or monetizing IP; determining if your idea has commercial potential; creating a startup or new venture; or working with industry for research or partnerships. Open to all RPI faculty and staff. No RSVP required.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Celebrating May Staff Promotions!
item.description:
Join us in congratulating our colleagues who achieved promotions in May! Their commitment to excellence and professional growth helps strengthen RPI every day.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
